headline: Our Carabao Cup
body: Four of our league fixtures in August and September have been selected for broadcast. Our Carabao Cup tie against Port Vale has also been moved. wolves.co.uk/news/mens-first… Link New dates for West Brom and Blues derbies Wolves’ derby fixtures against West Bromwich Albion and Birmingham City in September are among four matches which have been moved for live TV broadcast. wolves.co.uk
raw_text:
Four of our league fixtures in August and September have been selected for broadcast.

Our Carabao Cup tie against Port Vale has also been moved.

wolves.co.uk/news/mens-first…

Link



New dates for West Brom and Blues derbies

Wolves’ derby fixtures against West Bromwich Albion and Birmingham City in September are among four matches which have been moved for live TV broadcast.
wolves.co.uk
